Dunbar, Fields Between ASDA & Railway Line
comments: While walking along the path across the fields behind ASDA, a Hobby flew low over the path just in front of me. It was dusk but the grey upper parts were quite obvious (it was going slightly away from me so I couldn't see the face). The shape and flight were very distinctive, smaller than  Peregrine with relatively longer, narrower and more pointed wings and faster flight. I'm very familiar with them from southern England. There has been a recent arrival of Quail and other southern species in Southern Scotland over the past few days.
Seen while on boating trip at Seabird Center
sitting on the beach alone far away from home. not sure how he got here
